AD_Power_Jumbo.income_verification: Refer to AUS / Fannie Mae Seller Guide, VOE within 10 days of consummation is required
AD_Power_Jumbo.credit_event: Refer to AUS for BK, FCL, SS, DL, Modification; 6 payments out of Forbearance required
AD_Power_Jumbo.credit_history_tradelines: Refer to AUS / Fannie Mae Guideline
AD_Power_Jumbo.appraisal: PIW is not allowed; Second Appraisal over $2 million; Appraisal transfer is not allowed
AD_Power_Jumbo.gift_funds: Gift funds are eligible. Gifts of equity are ineligible

Super_Prime_Prime.income_verification: 1Y & 2Y Full Doc, 1Y & 2Y P&L, 12M & 24M Bank Statement, Asset Utilization, WVOE, 1099
occupancy: Investment (Vacant or Tenant Occupied - Lease Agreement not required if not used in DTI)
Super_Prime_Prime.credit_event: 48 Months out of Credit Event (BK, FCL, SS, DL, modification, forbearance) and 120+ days are considered as a Credit Event
Super_Prime_Prime.credit_history_tradelines: If 3 scores not available: 3 for past >=12 months OR 2 for past >=24 months. Middle Lowest for multiple borrowers, Lowest if only 2 scores. 120 days age max. Limited tradelines are allowed
Super_Prime_Prime.appraisal: Full Appraisal completed within last 360 days supported by AVM ordered by AD internally (10% variance with confidence score >= 90%). LA <= $250K: AVM with 90%+ confidence score (supported by different AVM with 10% variance & confidence score >= 90%) and a new Property Condition. LA > $250K: 120 days age max. Second Appraisal required for loan amounts > $2 million
Super_Prime_Prime.assets: Assets sourced and seasoned for 30 days, 120 days age max. Overseas Assets sourced for 60 days. 1031 Exchange Eligible
Super_Prime_Prime.gift_funds: Gift funds allowed (Borrower Contribution Required under 80% CLTV: OO - 0%, Investment - 10%; over 80% CLTV: OO - 5%, Investment - NA) for down payment, closing costs
Super_Prime_Prime.interest_only: 120 Months of Interest Only Period, 240/360 Months of Amortization
Super_Prime_Prime.cash_out: Max cash-in-hand $500,000 for CLTV >65%, $1,000,000 for CLTV <=65% to >=55%, no max cash-in-hand limitation for CLTV <55%

ITIN_DSCR.income_verification: DSCR = Gross Income / Proposed PITIA. Borrower income is not required. DSCR < 1 requires min FICO 680 or No FICO
occupancy: Investment (Vacant or Tenant Occupied - Lease Agreement not required if not used in DTI)
ITIN_DSCR.credit_event: 48 Months out of Credit Event (BK, FCL, SS, DL, modification, forbearance) and 120+ days are considered as a Credit Event
ITIN_DSCR.credit_history_tradelines: If 3 scores not available: 3 for past >=12 months OR 2 for past >=24 months. Middle Lowest for multiple borrowers, Lowest if only 2 scores. 120 days age max
ITIN_DSCR.assets: Assets sourced and seasoned for 30 days, 120 days age max. Overseas Assets sourced for 60 days. 1031 Exchange Eligible
ITIN_DSCR.gift_funds: Gift funds allowed (Borrower Contribution Required - 10%) for down payment, closing costs
ITIN_DSCR.interest_only: 120 Months of Interest Only Period, 240/360 Months of Amortization
ITIN_DSCR.cash_out: Max cash-in-hand $500,000 for CLTV >65%, $1,000,000 for CLTV <=65% to >=55%, no max cash-in-hand limitation for CLTV <55%

Foreign_National_DSCR.income_verification: Letter from a Foreign CPA providing income for the last 2 years and YTD earnings. DSCR = Gross Income / Proposed PITIA. Borrower income is not required. DSCR must be equal to 1 or above
Foreign_National_DSCR.credit_event: 12 Months out of Credit Event (BK, FCL, SS, DL, modification, forbearance) and 120+ days are considered as a Credit Event
Foreign_National_DSCR.credit_history_tradelines: 1 Bank Reference Letter. No Score is allowed. Foreign National: No score or 680 min FICO (No FICO). 1 Bank Reference Letter

Foreign_National_Full_Doc.income_verification: 2Y Full Doc, 12M & 24M Bank Statement, Asset Utilization, WVOE, 1099, DSCR = Gross Income / Proposed PITIA. Borrower income is not required
Foreign_National_Full_Doc.min_fico: No Score for FN or FICO 680
occupancy: Investment (Vacant or Tenant Occupied - Lease Agreement not required if not used in DTI)
Foreign_National_Full_Doc.gift_funds: Gift funds allowed (under 80% CLTV Borrower Contribution Required: OO - 0%, Inv - 10%; over 80% CLTV: OO - 5%, Inv - NA)

short_term_rental.notes: STR is listed as eligible property type across multiple programs

rural_property.notes: SFR Rural listed as eligible property type
